violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal edges of particle board shelving in BOH prep area.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. BOH convection ovens not located under hood system.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Drawer cooler at grill station has pooling water. Needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. BOH shelving has buildup and needs cleaning. Pie cooler has food debris buildup and needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor has an accumulation of food debris in walk in freezer and walk in cooler under shelving units. Needs cleaning. Ceiling tiles discolored around BOH convection ovens. Ceiling tiles in areas have buildup of dust around venting. Need cleaning.
